answer: The vast majority of orders, 96,478 out of 99,133 total, have been delivered, representing over 97% of all orders. This indicates a highly efficient fulfillment process with most orders reaching customers successfully. In contrast, only 1,107 orders are still in the shipped status, suggesting a relatively small backlog. The canceled and unavailable statuses account for 625 and 609 orders respectively, showing that less than 1.3% of orders face issues preventing delivery.
sql:
SELECT order_status, COUNT(*) AS num_orders
FROM orders
GROUP BY order_status
ORDER BY num_orders DESC
LIMIT 1000
